name: How is fault decided if I was partly to blame in a Saint George site accident?
description: Utah/Idaho: Recover if <50% at fault, reduced proportionally.

mainEntity.name: How is fault decided if I was partly to blame in a Saint George site accident?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah/Idaho: Recover if <50% at fault, reduced proportionally.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Utah uses modified comparative negligence: recover if under 50% at fault, reduced by your share; barred if 50% or more.** Insurers often blame victims for not wearing gear or ignoring warnings[1]. **Key factors:** 1. Fault assessed via evidence like photos, witnesses, OSHA reports. 2. Applies to third-party claims. 3. Idaho similar with 50% bar[2]. 4. Multiple parties' negligence apportioned. Gather all evidence immediately. A lawyer counters insurer arguments to protect your compensation percentage.
